news.headline: Economy to 'grow by 4pc' in FY26, says finance minister
news.summary:
<p>ISLAMABAD: Finance Minister Muhammad Aurangzeb on Tuesday said Pakistan’s economy is projected to grow by four per cent in the current fiscal year, citing improving macroeconomic indicators as a sign of recovery.</p>
